items.title: Mobile Submission and Smart Audit Initiative
items.description: Focused investment to reduce mobile expense friction and raise explainability in smart-audit decisions.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase repeated use of mobile workflows.

productBricks.change: Improve extraction accuracy and low-confidence handling.
Reduce mobile workflow friction and improve approval actions.

deliveryChannels.change: Roll out updated employee and manager mobile flows.
Roll out updated audit review explanations.

items.title: Travel Policy and Approval Initiative
items.description: Focused investment to improve travel feed coverage, trip policy checks, and pre-trip approval quality.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase travel spend covered by policy checks before booking.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase the amount of travel volume governed by Rydoo workflows.

productBricks.change: Improve travel provider data completeness and latency.
Improve trip policy evaluation by route, class, and supplier.
Improve pre-trip approval routing and escalation.

deliveryChannels.change: Roll out improved travel-provider connector support.
Roll out improved trip workspace and approval views.

items.title: Card Match and Reimbursement Initiative
items.description: Focused investment to improve card feed matching, unresolved-card workflows, and reimbursement-state clarity.

customerKPIs.kpi: Monthly close cycle for employee spend
customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce finance handling time for card-backed spend.

businessKPIs.kpi: Card attach in managed spend accounts

productBricks.change: Improve cardholder activation and controls setup.

deliveryChannels.change: Roll out updated card exception and reimbursement workflows.

items.title: Finance Export and Spend Intelligence Initiative
items.description: Focused investment to improve ERP export trust, tax handling, and analytics visibility for controllers and travel leaders.

customerKPIs.kpi: Monthly close cycle for employee spend

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve trust in archived and exported records.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase attach of analytics and finance workflows in strategic accounts.

productBricks.change: Improve ERP mappings and export validation.
Improve tax-related coding and export fields.

deliveryChannels.change: Roll out updated ERP connector behavior.
Roll out updated spend intelligence models.
Roll out updated finance workspace dashboards.
